vol_name: PAIRS: Prediction and interception research study
vol_description:
Tasks: Five computer-based interception tasks, including time estimation, spatial prediction, ball catching, ball bouncing, and a simple reaction time task. All tasks were implemented in the Lookit platform.
Demographic information: Age (7-17 years), sex, autism diagnosis (all autistic children and adolescents were recruited through the SPARK database)
Data types: video recording (.mp4) and frame-by-frame kinematics (.csv)
MATLAB codes to extract the demographic and kinematic information out of individual csv files.
user_affiliation: University of Texas at San Antonio
